r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Weight loss requires dieting (restriction) or intensive exercise
relatability_triggers: Nutritionists have discovered that certain foods cause you to lose weight.

s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: : Experiments have shown that 15 particularly healthful and nutritious foods (some of which are vegetables and fruits) burn more calories than they contribute. So the more you eat, the more you burn off your excess weight. These foods (with fat-burning calories) are transformed into energy, not fat. The power of fat-burning foods to dissolve excess fat will seem obvious to you when you understand how your body accumulates fat. You are born with a certain number of 'adipose' cells. These adipose cells swell up and multiply when you take on too much weight. As soon as your metabolism slows down, this allows carbohydrate-based foods to be changed into fat. This fat is stored. Therefore, you cannot lose weight by draining the fat from the cells. You can only do this in three ways: omit foods that are rich in fat (dieting); intensive exercising; or eating foods with fat-burning calories that burn off the fat and drain it from your cells.
unique_differentiators: 15 specific foods that burn more calories than they contribute

lead.hook_sentence: Nutritionists have discovered that certain foods cause you to lose weight.
lead.full_text: Nutritionists have discovered that certain foods cause you to lose weight. These are foods with fat-burning calories. The more you eat, the more weight you lose. In a report that you can receive without obligation, you will discover what these foods are, why they cause you to lose weight, and how.
lead.transition_to_body: Q&A format begins to explain mechanism

curiosity_progression.amplified_gap: How can eating MORE cause weight loss?
curiosity_progression.partial_resolution: They burn more calories than they contribute

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Weight loss requires eating less. This says eat more.

mechanism.explanation_text: Experiments have shown that 15 particularly healthful and nutritious foods (some of which are vegetables and fruits) burn more calories than they contribute. So the more you eat, the more you burn off your excess weight. These foods (with fat-burning calories) are transformed into energy, not fat. The power of fat-burning foods to dissolve excess fat will seem obvious to you when you understand how your body accumulates fat. You are born with a certain number of 'adipose' cells. These adipose cells swell up and multiply when you take on too much weight. As soon as your metabolism slows down, this allows carbohydrate-based foods to be changed into fat. This fat is stored. Therefore, you cannot lose weight by draining the fat from the cells. You can only do this in three ways: omit foods that are rich in fat (dieting); intensive exercising; or eating foods with fat-burning calories that burn off the fat and drain it from your cells.
mechanism.uniqueness_claim: 15 specific foods that burn more calories than they contribute
proof_elements: Testimonials with specific weight loss claims

primary_promise.statement: Lose 5-6 pounds per week by adding fat-burning foods to normal diet

supporting_promises.statement: No diet required - eat anything you want

promise_architecture.promise_ceiling: Lose up to 7 pounds first week if significantly overweight
promise_architecture.promise_floor: Full refund if don't lose at least 5 pounds per week
promise_architecture.competitive_positioning: Easiest method - no diet, no exercise, no deprivation

three_part_structure.what_they_think: Weight loss requires dieting (restriction) or intensive exercise
three_part_structure.what_it_really_is: Certain foods burn more calories than they contribute - add these and fat melts away
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: Other methods (bean pod capsules, pineapple capsules, various diets) don't address the fat-burning calorie principle

root_cause_architecture.blame_transfer: From 'you lack willpower' to 'you just didn't know about fat-burning foods'

narrative_reorganization.self_blame_removal: You're not weak or lazy - you just didn't know about these specific foods
narrative_reorganization.coherence_creation: Explains why diets and supplements failed - they didn't use the fat-burning principle
narrative_reorganization.new_self_concept: Informed eater who knows the secret to effortless weight loss

proof_elements.verbatim_text: I have lost 35 pounds. All my life I have suffered from being fat and I had tried everything to lose weight. The fat-burning calorie foods are the only thing that have ever worked for me. I feel like a new woman. My husband also lost 23 pounds. We are delighted to have rediscovered the joy of life that we had long since lost.

In three weeks, I lost 19 pounds of excess weight. Since then I have not regained that fat. Because I had already tried so many methods and medications to lose weight, I no longer believed in any of them. But I tried this anyway. Thank heaven!

proof_elements.claim_supported: Lost 38 pounds total, 23 in two weeks
proof_elements.verbatim_text: I often dreamed of becoming slim, but nothing I ever tried ever helped me lose weight. Now I have discovered fat-burning calories. I lost 23 pounds in two short weeks and a total of 38 pounds more quickly than I would have dared to hope. My husband told me last night that I am prettier than I ever have been.

If you do not lose at least five pounds per week, within 90 days return the Report on 'Fat-Burning Foods that Cause Weight Loss' and I will send you your money back no later than nine days after receipt of your returned package.

Since then I have not regained that fat. Because I had already tried so many methods and medications to lose weight, I no longer believed in any of them... I often dreamed of becoming slim, but nothing I ever tried ever helped me lose weight. Now I have discovered fat-burning calories. I lost 23 pounds in two short weeks...
story_architecture.lesson_or_moral: This works when nothing else did

metadata.extraction_notes: Classic info marketing piece. Q&A format. Ran for 12 years - extremely successful. Ann Morgan byline.
